features.featureTitle: When a USB printer is successfully connected, save the printer's USB vendor ID and product ID (and any other identifying information available from WebUSB) to localStorage. On app open, automatically attempt to reconnect to the last connected printer using the stored identifiers. Show the connection result (success or failure) using the existing printer status badge in the header.

In the ScanPrintTab two-step scanning workflow, after the 2nd serial number is scanned, check if it is exactly equal to the 1st serial number (after normalization via serialNormalization.ts). If they are identical, display a prominent inline error message instructing the user to scan a unique serial number, and play the error sound using the existing soundSystem.ts error sound. Do not proceed with printing. Clear the 2nd serial field so the user can re-scan.
